resource.name: btnLog.Hint
resource.object: Select logfile and active logging to file.

resource.name: btnFlush.Hint
resource.object: Flush data to the log file.

resource.name: btnHold.Hint
resource.object: Pause or run the autoscroll of the output window.

resource.name: chkUseFilter.ToolTip
resource.object: Check to filter what is feeding to the output

resource.name: chkUseRegEx.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if the filter is a regual expression

resource.name: ConfirmShutdown
resource.object: Do you want to shut down the system?

resource.name: ConfirmStopProgram
resource.object: Do you want to stop the selected program(s)?

resource.name: btnLog.Hint
resource.object: Select logfile and active logging to file.

resource.name: btnFlush.Hint
resource.object: Flush data to the log file.

resource.name: btnHold.Hint
resource.object: Pause or run the autoscroll of the output window.

resource.name: DefaultDescription
resource.object: The device is not available on the server

resource.name: ApplyFailed
resource.object: Failed to apply changes to the database because of an unspecified error.

resource.name: checkEditOpenOnStartup.ToolTip
resource.object: Check here if you want this item to be automatically opened on startup, after login.\nThe first marked item in the menu tree will be opened by default on startup.\nApplies to the IPC,PDA and WPL platforms.

resource.name: textEditDisplayTime.ToolTip
resource.object: Only applies to the Billboard platform.\nThe display time of this item (in seconds) on the billboard before rotating to the next item on the list.

resource.name: textEditRefreshRate.ToolTip
resource.object: Only applies to the Billboard platform.\nThe refresh rate of the contents of this item (in seconds) when displayed on a billboard.\n Set this to 0 if the item should never be refreshed by the billboard (or if the item itself takes care of automatic refresh).

resource.name: checkEditTest.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked then install or update of package will only be tested and not committed to database.

resource.name: buttonEditFile.ToolTip
resource.object: Separate multiple files with a semicolon (the ; character)

resource.name: FileNotExists
resource.object: The package file '{0}' does not exist or is not accessible.

resource.name: MustChange
resource.object: User must change the password at the next login

resource.name: ValidateCron.Text
resource.object: Some fields in Cron string have to be set.

resource.name: zerocount
resource.object: You must select on or more record.

resource.name: EmployeeMultipleLoginError
resource.object: Station does not allow logging in multiple employees.

resource.name: LicenseKeyNotTempKey
resource.object: License key is not temporary key

resource.name: ConfirmClearFeaturesWarning
resource.object: Are you sure you want to clear all feature information for the installed temporary license key?

resource.name: ConfirmRelease
resource.object: Are you sure you want to release all client instances for host {0}?

resource.name: NoClientInstancesFound
resource.object: No client instances for host {0} found.

resource.name: Child.NoAssembly
resource.object: Assembly for a child '{0}' not found in the assembly table

resource.name: Child.CreateFailed
resource.object: Failed to create child '{0}' for plugin '{1}'

resource.name: Child.CreatePluginFailed
resource.object: Failed to create instance of the plugin.

resource.name: Server.Lookup.Hint
resource.object: Select plugin host to view plugs which it runs

resource.name: couldNotConstruct
resource.object: No interpreter with given ID found.

resource.name: tooFewColumns
resource.object: Data must contain at least 2 columns

resource.name: formatError
resource.object: Could not format value: formatstring='{0}' displayvalue='{1}'

resource.name: FramePanel.Hint
resource.object: A panel component with frame look

resource.name: MessageField.Hint
resource.object: Monitor a field from a message

resource.name: ConnectionStatus.Hint
resource.object: Monitor connection status for a device

resource.name: SendCommand.Hint
resource.object: Sends a command or a Lua message to the device

resource.name: WeightStatusGauge.Hint
resource.object: Monitors weight status in a gauge

resource.name: PageControl.Hint
resource.object: A button to control some dashboard pages function.

resource.name: PictureBox.Hint
resource.object: Simple box to show an image

resource.name: CaptionedLabel.Hint
resource.object: A label with caption and text fields

resource.name: QueryLabel.Hint
resource.object: Monitors a result from a query

resource.name: WebBrowser.Hint
resource.object: Web browser component, can display any web page

resource.name: WebItem.Hint
resource.object: Use this component to display web items from Innova web site

resource.name: QueryRequest.Hint
resource.object: Component to define a simple query and show result in a grid

resource.name: ConfirmTableChange
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change the table name?\nThis will clear the following column(s) as they are not compatible with the selected table:

resource.name: ConfirmCriteriaChange
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change to this criteria?\nThis will clear the following column(s) as they are not compatible with the criteria:

resource.name: durationLabel.Text
resource.object: For how long can the cleaning session run?

resource.name: lblBackup.Text
resource.object: Maximum time since last database backup:

resource.name: lblSuccess.Text
resource.object: Maximum time allowed to pass without successfully cleaning all configured tables:

resource.name: edIndexThreshold.ToolTip
resource.object: How much the index may be fragmented before the indexes are rebuild for the tables.

resource.name: edStatisticSampleSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the procent of sample size. 100% is same as full scan.

resource.name: chkBuildIndexOnline.ToolTip
resource.object: Online the table will not lock during rebuild. Offline the table will lock during rebuild. Not all databases supports the online option. If database does not support online the operation will be downgraded to offline.

resource.name: Conflict Warning
resource.object: Time slot conflicts with another. Please select a new time

resource.name: NoBackupCleanAborted
resource.object: No recent backup available, clean aborted.

resource.name: CouldNotStartCleaning
resource.object: Could not start cleaning, please ensure the server program is running.

resource.name: ErrorGettingServerConfig
resource.object: Could not get configuration of server program, please ensure the database maintenance program is running.

resource.name: CouldNotGetStatus
resource.object: Could not check running status of server program, please ensure the database maintenance program is running.

resource.name: CouldNotUpdateServerConfig
resource.object: Could not update configuration of server program, please ensure the database maintenance program is running.

resource.name: CouldNotStop
resource.object: Could not stop running cleanups, please ensure the database maintenance program is running.

resource.name: CleaningInProgress
resource.object: It is not possible to start a cleaning session while another session is in progress.

resource.name: NoAccess.Text
resource.object: You do not have access level to open this menu item

resource.name: NoGuiItem.Text
resource.object: Gui item to open was not found or gui node do not exist

resource.name: OpenGuiItem.Hint
resource.object: A button to open a gui item

resource.name: SaveChanges
resource.object: Would you like to save before you continue?

resource.name: NotConfigurable
resource.object: This report does not have any configuration

resource.name: NoMatch
resource.object: The configuration does not match the report

resource.name: MissingMethodMessage
resource.object: The selected report can not be used as template because it is missing a parameterless constructor.

resource.name: descriptionLabel.Text
resource.object: Create a blank report or select an existing report as template

resource.name: chkUseFilter.ToolTip
resource.object: Check to filter what is feeding to the output

resource.name: chkUseRegEx.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if the filter is a regual expression

resource.name: RemoveSubreportMessage
resource.object: Note that the subreport tree item will also be removed.

resource.name: InvalidImportMessage
resource.object: The selected file format is incorrect.

resource.name: templateLabel.Text
resource.object: Configuration not found. Please locate template

resource.name: Error.ApplicationInit
resource.object: Failed to initialize menu editor application.

resource.name: Close.Text
resource.object: Do want to save the changes before closing the form?

resource.name: Refresh.Question
resource.object: Do you wish to continue with refresh and throw away changes?

resource.name: Preview.Error.Text
resource.object: Please select menu or node inside menu to preview.

resource.name: BtnAdd.ToolTip.Text
resource.object: Add node to the selected branch.

resource.name: BtnHelp.ToolTip.Text
resource.object: Show overview of shortcuts used in the application.

resource.name: Error.NoPaste
resource.object: Not allowed to paste clipboard data to the node.

resource.name: Delete.Nodes
resource.object: Do you want to delete selected nodes and their children?

resource.name: Delete.Node
resource.object: Do you want to delete the node

resource.name: Error.NoNodeAdd
resource.object: Can not add to selected node.

resource.name: BtnTreeSearch.ToolTip.Text
resource.object: Search for node or nodes which match search criteria.

resource.name: btnDelete.ToolTip
resource.object: To remove selected form configurations from database.

resource.name: lblInfoText.Text
resource.object: This list is a best guess of form configuration that are currently not in use by the menu editor. However there could be some items which are referred elsewhere or still begin referred if data is unsaved, so if trying to delete those items you will get an error. For best result save the editor data first.

resource.name: Delete.Text
resource.object: Do you want to remove the selected form configuration(s) from the database?

resource.name: Text
resource.object: Select Functions To Apply To Form

resource.name: btnCancel.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to close dialog and cancel all changes.

resource.name: grpSearchForm.Text
resource.object: Search for nodes assigned to selected form

resource.name: NodeName.NullText
resource.object: <type in text of node to find>

resource.name: NodeName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the text of the node, form or form config name to find.{0}Will search in all languages of the node display text.{0}You can search for partial name or full name.

resource.name: SearchForm.ToolTip
resource.object: To search for a node(s) assigned to {0}the selected assembly and form.

resource.name: PartialSearch.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if doing partial or full text searching.

resource.name: SearchNode.ToolTip
resource.object: To search for a given text in nodes, forms and forms config name.

resource.name: Error.Node.Text
resource.object: Please type in text of node to find.

resource.name: SearchResult.Nodes
resource.object: Nodes found having the given text

resource.name: lblInfoText.Text
resource.object: Do you want to apply this settings only to the node or included the subnodes as well?

resource.name: btnSelect.ToolTip
resource.object: Go to and select the selected node in the list above.

resource.name: btnUnshare.ToolTip
resource.object: Clicking this button and the current node will no longer be shared by above nodes.

resource.name: lblHeaderText.Text
resource.object: Please select a form configuration or create new configuration.

resource.name: btnShareConfig.ToolTip
resource.object: Select node and click this button to share form configuration with it. Or double click on a item in the list above to share.

resource.name: btnReuseConfig.ToolTip
resource.object: Select item and click this button to use it. Or double click on the item in the list above to use.

resource.name: btnNewConfig.ToolTip
resource.object: Click this button if want to create new configuration.

resource.name: btnCancel.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to cancel selection of the form.

resource.name: GridItems.ToolTip
resource.object: List of forms which are found in the database and no node is using.

resource.name: GridNodes.ToolTip
resource.object: List of nodes which are also assigned to the selected assembly and form.\nEach node might have a different configuration.

resource.name: edPicIcon.ToolTip
resource.object: Custom icon for top level folder.

resource.name: btnAddIcon.ToolTip
resource.object: Select custom image for the node. Please use 16x16 px images only.

resource.name: btnDelIcon.ToolTip
resource.object: Removes the custom image from the node.

resource.name: SaveIcon.Title
resource.object: Select file to save the image to.

resource.name: edMenuId.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the menu name/id. No spaces are allowed.

resource.name: edDescription.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in short description of the menu.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the configuration.

resource.name: btnFunctions.ToolTip
resource.object: To add or remove functions for the form.

resource.name: btnClear.ToolTip
resource.object: Remove selected form from the node.

resource.name: btnCtxDesigner.ToolTipText
resource.object: Opens a designer to configure the form if one is available.

resource.name: btnThinCtxDesigner.ToolTipText
resource.object: Opens a designer to configure the context configuration for the form if one is available.

resource.name: btnCtxXmlEditor.ToolTipText
resource.object: Opens standard xml editor for the configuration data.

resource.name: ButtonShare.Share.ToolTip
resource.object: Select form configuration to share from.

resource.name: ButtonShare.Shared.ToolTip
resource.object: To see who are sharing the form.

resource.name: Reuse.Text
resource.object: This form contains some configuration data.{0}{0}Do you want to keep the configuration?

resource.name: NameValidate.Text
resource.object: This name is already in use, please type in different name.

resource.name: edName.Properties.NullValuePrompt
resource.object: <type in unique name for form configuration>

resource.name: btnBackup.ToolTip
resource.object: Make a backup of the current configuration (Gui Item).

resource.name: Error.NoGuiItem
resource.object: No gui item selected to backup

resource.name: btnGet.ToolTip
resource.object: Show menu for selected employee and culture.

resource.name: Error.CultureExists
resource.object: Culture already exists in the list.

resource.name: btnExport.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to export to the selected file.

resource.name: lblInfo.Text
resource.object: Please select file to export menu package to.

resource.name: chkAddAsGlobalFolder.ToolTip
resource.object: Check if you want to add the selected node as global folder to existing package file. If checked then select package file to export to.

resource.name: chkIncludeConfig.ToolTip
resource.object: Check you want to include node and form configurations in the package file.

resource.name: edFile.ToolTip
resource.object: Select file to export menu package to.

resource.name: Info.Info
resource.object: To export to a new menu package please select a folder to export. To add global nodes to existing package please select one or more nodes to add.

resource.name: NotAllowed.Multi.Text
resource.object: You have selected multiple nodes, please select only one folder to export.

resource.name: NotAllowed.Text
resource.object: Please select folder to export package for.

resource.name: ExportFile.Title
resource.object: Select file to create menu package to

resource.name: ImportFile.Title
resource.object: Select menu package to add global nodes to.

resource.name: Export.Global.Failed
resource.object: Adding global nodes to package failed.

resource.name: Error.NotFolder
resource.object: Selected node is not a folder.

resource.name: Error.NoApplication
resource.object: Unable to get application for selected folder.

resource.name: Error.NoAssembly
resource.object: Unable to get assembly for node.

resource.name: Error.NodeNoParent
resource.object: Tree node {0} does not have parent folder.

resource.name: edFile.ToolTip
resource.object: Select menu package file to import.

resource.name: btnImport.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to import the selected file.

resource.name: Info
resource.object: Click 'Import' to import the menu package.

resource.name: Info.Root
resource.object: Menu item '{0}' and its content from the package will be installed/updated under the tree item '{1}'.

resource.name: Info.Menu
resource.object: Folder '{0}' and its content from the package will be installed/updated under the tree item '{1}'.

resource.name: Info.Folder
resource.object: Content of the folder '{0}' from the pacakge will be installed/updated under the tree item '{1}'.

resource.name: NotAllowed.Text
resource.object: Please select either root, menu or folder node to install package for.

resource.name: NotExists.Text
resource.object: The package file does not exists or is not accessible.

resource.name: Error.InvalidNodeType
resource.object: Invalid node type to install for.

resource.name: GlobalFolders.NoFolder
resource.object: Global folder '{0}' not found in the menu package which is being installed for '{1}'.

resource.name: Error.NoSiteId
resource.object: Site id not specified for application.

resource.name: Error.NoApplicationId
resource.object: Application id not supplied in menu package.

resource.name: GlobalFolders.Text1
resource.object: Following global folder(s) where not found in the menu you are importing under.

resource.name: GlobalFolders.Text2
resource.object: Do you want to continue import and skip importing the global folders?

resource.name: edGeneral.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum time a execution can run without being logged for general module in seconds.

resource.name: edUnitOpCreate.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum time to create a unit operation set without being logged in seconds.

resource.name: edUnitOp.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum time a unit operation can run without being logged in seconds.

resource.name: edReport.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum time a report generation can run without being logged in seconds.

resource.name: edLabelling.ToolTip
resource.object: Maximum time a label generation can run without being logged in seconds.

resource.name: UpdateButton.Hint
resource.object: Reads current fragment informations for selected indexes.

resource.name: BuildButton.Rebuild.Hint
resource.object: Rebuild indexes and update statistics for selected indexes.

resource.name: grpOperations.Text
resource.object: Select operation to perform on selected indexes

resource.name: chkUpdateStatistics.ToolTip
resource.object: Check to update statistics for selected indexes.

resource.name: edStatisticSampleSize.ToolTip
resource.object: Define the procent of sample size. 100% is same as full scan.

resource.name: UpdateInProgress.Text
resource.object: It is not possible to start a rebuild session while another session is in progress.

resource.name: CouldNotStartUpdate.Text
resource.object: Could not start update, please ensure the server program is running.

resource.name: NoRowsSelected.Text
resource.object: No rows are selected to build

resource.name: CouldNotStartRebuild.Text
resource.object: Could not start index rebuild, please ensure the server program is running.

resource.name: CouldNotStop.Text
resource.object: Could not stop running index builds, please ensure the database maintenance program is running.

resource.name: BuildStopped.Text
resource.object: The build request was stopped manually.

resource.name: UpdateStarted
resource.object: Request for update on index information started.

resource.name: edName.ToolTip
resource.object: Type in the name of the configuration backup.

resource.name: configurationError
resource.object: Configuration error. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: QueryChart.Hint
resource.object: Component to define a simple query and show result in a chart.

resource.name: Error.InQuery
resource.object: Any or the words alter, update, delete, truncate, insert, drop are not allowed in query.

resource.name: ExecuteScripts.Hint
resource.object: A button to execute a list of scripts

resource.name: ConfirmExecution
resource.object: Are you sure you want to execute the following scripts: '{0}' ?

resource.name: ScriptFailed
resource.object: Script {0} failed. See log for more information.
